parameters.jsCode: const input = $input.first().json; const metrics = input.metrics || input; const m = { totalRevenue: parseFloat(metrics.totalRevenue) || 0, totalOrders: parseInt(metrics.totalOrders) || 0, confirmedOrders: parseInt(metrics.confirmedOrders) || 0, deliveredOrders: parseInt(metrics.deliveredOrders) || 0, adSpend: parseFloat(metrics.adSpend) || 0, clicks: parseInt(metrics.clicks) || 0, impressions: parseInt(metrics.impressions) || 0, roas: parseFloat(metrics.roas) || 0, cpa: parseFloat(metrics.cpa) || 0, confirmationRate: parseFloat(metrics.confirmationRate) || 0, deliveryRate: parseFloat(metrics.deliveryRate) || 0, avgOrderValue: parseFloat(metrics.avgOrderValue) || 0, period: metrics.period || 'daily' }; m.conversionRate = m.impressions > 0 ? ((m.totalOrders / m.impressions) * 100).toFixed(2) : 0; m.profitMargin = m.totalRevenue > 0 ? (((m.totalRevenue - m.adSpend) / m.totalRevenue) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0; const anomalies = []; if (m.roas < 2.0) anomalies.push({ type: 'roas_drop', severity: 'high', message: `ROAS dropped to ${m.roas}x - review underperforming campaigns` }); if (m.deliveryRate < 50) anomalies.push({ type: 'low_delivery', severity: 'medium', message: `Delivery rate at ${m.deliveryRate}% - investigate shipping issues` }); if (m.confirmationRate < 60) anomalies.push({ type: 'low_confirmation', severity: 'medium', message: `Confirmation rate at ${m.confirmationRate}% - optimize confirmation flow` }); if (m.cpa > 100) anomalies.push({ type: 'high_cpa', severity: 'warning', message: `CPA at EGP ${m.cpa} - above target` }); if (m.roas > 4.0) anomalies.push({ type: 'scaling_opportunity', severity: 'info', message: `ROAS at ${m.roas}x - increase ad spend for scaling` }); return [{json: { ...m, anomalies, hasAnomalies: anomalies.length > 0, reportDate: new Date().toISOString() }}];

parts.text: Generate a business insight report in English: Revenue: EGP {{ $json.totalRevenue }}, Orders: {{ $json.totalOrders }} ({{ $json.confirmedOrders }} confirmed, {{ $json.deliveredOrders }} delivered), Ad Spend: EGP {{ $json.adSpend }}, ROAS: {{ $json.roas }}x, CPA: EGP {{ $json.cpa }}, Confirmation: {{ $json.confirmationRate }}%, Delivery: {{ $json.deliveryRate }}%, Profit Margin: {{ $json.profitMargin }}%, Anomalies: {{ JSON.stringify($json.anomalies) }}. Provide: headline, 2-3 key insights, 2 actionable recommendations, overall grade (A-F). Keep concise.

messages.content: Generate concise business analytics reports. Include headline, insights, recommendations, grade.

Revenue: EGP {{ $json.totalRevenue }}, Orders: {{ $json.totalOrders }}, ROAS: {{ $json.roas }}x, CPA: EGP {{ $json.cpa }}, Confirmation: {{ $json.confirmationRate }}%, Delivery: {{ $json.deliveryRate }}%, Anomalies: {{ JSON.stringify($json.anomalies) }}
